# Deterministic representative sample of Music Assembler HVSC tunes
# (relative to the HVSC C64Music root), used by tests/test_corpus.py.
# Paths only -- the copyright tunes are NEVER committed; the test reads
# them from $HVSC (or the tunecache) and SKIPs when unavailable.
# Stratified across ~97 distinct load addresses to exercise every player
# relocation/build.  Regenerate via scripts/sample_corpus.py.
